本书精心写了众多精彩纷呈、扣人心弦的悬疑故事内容，犹如为您徐徐开启了一扇通往神秘推理世界的厚重大门，引领着您一步步深陷其中，无法自拔。

在这充满重重迷雾的奇妙旅程中，每一个故事都恰似一座迂回曲折、错综复杂的迷宫。

它们静静地等待着您去勇敢探寻，去抽丝剥茧，揭开那隐匿在层层迷雾之后令人震撼的真相。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2ob7c462e725dd362f6ec5af45ba16c5bd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"向阳的一棵树","author_id":"","book_id":"7420009166703430681","book_name":"最真实的悬疑恐怖故事","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7420009270873162265","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"547891"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"252","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/a19e49d620ef8d127f879602bb4170b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256692&x-signature=fma8xeNGO09czeOwBeZfpg%2FmBvI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"43588785288103","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"107"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321135812F7A20AD3260D6BC2D60E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":24},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1728224938,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra"
